title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Reckitt India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Reckitt India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Reckitt India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Reckitt India Holdings Services:
Reckitt India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reckitt India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
